TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_John_Arthurs, title = John_Arthurs, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Arthurs} }

S.FORM: John Arthurs sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 8, John Arthurs, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

John Arthurs sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 8, John Arthurs, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oħn artħurs~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *oħn artħurs~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
